```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(forecast)
library(tseries)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```
```{r}
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.parquet"
FREQ       <- 52
ALPHA      <- 0.05

XREG_VARS <- c(
  "api_energy_and_lubricants",
  "api_fertilisers_and_soil_improvers",
  "api_plant_protection_products",
  "api_fresh_fruit",
  "api_fresh_vegetables",
  "fuel_petrol_price",
  "fuel_diesel_price",
  "sppi_road_freight"
)

DUMMY_VARS <- c("shock_2021q4_2023q1", "post_shock")

calc_smape <- function(actual, pred) {
  mean(200 * abs(actual - pred) / (abs(actual) + abs(pred)), na.rm = TRUE)
}

build_xreg <- function(data, vars) {
  avail <- vars[vars %in% names(data)]
  if (length(avail) == 0) return(NULL)
  mat <- data %>% select(all_of(avail)) %>% as.matrix()
  for (j in seq_len(ncol(mat))) {
    col_mean <- mean(mat[, j], na.rm = TRUE)
    mat[is.na(mat[, j]), j] <- col_mean
  }
  mat
}
```
```{r}
df <- arrow::read_parquet(INPUT_FILE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

if (!"target_was_missing" %in% names(df)) df$target_was_missing <- 0L

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
```
```{r}
all_results   <- list()
best_models   <- list()
all_preds     <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {
  sub <- df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>% filter(split == "train")
  test_df  <- sub %>% filter(split == "test")

  if (nrow(train_df) < 30 || nrow(test_df) == 0) next

  n_test   <- nrow(test_df)
  train_ts <- ts(train_df$target_price, frequency = FREQ)
  real_idx <- test_df$target_was_missing == 0

  base_model <- auto.arima(train_ts, seasonal = TRUE, trace = FALSE, ic = "aicc")
  arma <- base_model$arma
  pdq  <- c(arma[1], arma[6], arma[2])
  PDQ  <- c(arma[3], arma[7], arma[4])

  avail_xreg    <- XREG_VARS[XREG_VARS %in% names(sub) &
                               sapply(XREG_VARS, function(v) sum(!is.na(train_df[[v]])) > 10)]
  avail_dummies <- DUMMY_VARS[DUMMY_VARS %in% names(sub)]

  comm_results <- list()
  comm_models  <- list()
  pred_full    <- rep(NA, n_test)
  pred_dum     <- rep(NA, n_test)

  all_reg_vars    <- c(avail_xreg, avail_dummies)
  xreg_train_full <- build_xreg(train_df, all_reg_vars)
  xreg_test_full  <- build_xreg(test_df,  all_reg_vars)

  model_full <- tryCatch(
    Arima(train_ts, order = pdq,
          seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = FREQ),
          xreg = xreg_train_full, include.drift = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (!is.null(model_full)) {
    fc_full   <- forecast(model_full, xreg = xreg_test_full, h = n_test)
    pred_full <- as.numeric(fc_full$mean)
    smape_full <- round(calc_smape(test_df$target_price[real_idx], pred_full[real_idx]), 4)
    comm_results[["full"]] <- tibble(commodity = comm, model = "Full xreg", sMAPE = smape_full)
    comm_models[["Full xreg"]] <- model_full
  }

  if (length(avail_dummies) > 0) {
    xreg_train_dum <- build_xreg(train_df, avail_dummies)
    xreg_test_dum  <- build_xreg(test_df,  avail_dummies)

    model_dum <- tryCatch(
      Arima(train_ts, order = pdq,
            seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = FREQ),
            xreg = xreg_train_dum, include.drift = FALSE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(model_dum)) {
      fc_dum   <- forecast(model_dum, xreg = xreg_test_dum, h = n_test)
      pred_dum <- as.numeric(fc_dum$mean)
      smape_dum <- round(calc_smape(test_df$target_price[real_idx], pred_dum[real_idx]), 4)
      comm_results[["dummies"]] <- tibble(commodity = comm, model = "Dummies only", sMAPE = smape_dum)
      comm_models[["Dummies only"]] <- model_dum
    }
  }

  results <- bind_rows(comm_results)
  if (nrow(results) > 0) {
    all_results[[comm]] <- results

    best_row   <- results %>% slice_min(sMAPE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
    best_label <- best_row$model
    best_models[[comm]] <- comm_models[[best_label]]

    best_pred <- if (best_label == "Full xreg") pred_full else pred_dum
    all_preds[[comm]] <- tibble(date = test_df$date, actual = test_df$target_price, pred = best_pred)
  }
}

results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)
```
```{r}
cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("  REGRESSION WITH ARIMA ERRORS — sMAPE\n")
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")
print(results_df, n = Inf)
```
```{r}
best_df <- results_df %>%
  group_by(commodity) %>%
  slice_min(sMAPE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("  BEST MODEL PER COMMODITY (by sMAPE)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")
print(best_df, n = Inf)
```
```{r}
cat("\n  Residual diagnostics for best models:\n\n")

for (comm in names(best_models)) {
  model_obj <- best_models[[comm]]
  label     <- best_df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% pull(model)

  resid_clean <- as.numeric(residuals(model_obj))
  resid_clean <- resid_clean[!is.na(resid_clean)]

  cat(strrep("-", 50), "\n")
  cat("  ", comm, "—", label, "\n")
  cat(strrep("-", 50), "\n")

  lb <- Box.test(resid_clean, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")
  cat(sprintf("  Ljung-Box(10) p-value: %.4f %s\n", lb$p.value,
              ifelse(lb$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")))

  if (length(resid_clean) <= 5000) {
    nt <- shapiro.test(resid_clean)
    cat(sprintf("  Shapiro-Wilk p-value:  %.4f %s\n", nt$p.value,
                ifelse(nt$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")))
  }
  cat("\n")
}
```
```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
plots <- list()

for (comm in names(all_preds)) {
  label     <- best_df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% pull(model)
  smape_val <- best_df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% pull(sMAPE)

  sub      <- df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% arrange(date)
  train_df <- sub %>% filter(split == "train") %>% drop_na(target_price)

  cutoff     <- max(train_df$date) - 365 * 2
  train_plot <- train_df %>% filter(date >= cutoff)
  test_plot  <- all_preds[[comm]]

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = train_plot, aes(x = date, y = target_price),
              color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_line(data = test_plot, aes(x = date, y = actual, color = "Actual"),
              linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_line(data = test_plot, aes(x = date, y = pred, color = "Forecast"),
              linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "#2c3e50", "Forecast" = "#e74c3c"), name = NULL) +
    labs(title = comm,
         subtitle = sprintf("%s  |  sMAPE = %.2f", label, smape_val),
         x = NULL, y = "Price") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12), legend.position = "bottom")

  plots[[length(plots) + 1]] <- p
}

if (length(plots) > 0) {
  combined <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
    plot_annotation(title = "Regression with ARIMA Errors — Forecast vs Actual",
                    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)))
  print(combined)
}
```
